Listen to the audio and answer the multiple-choice question.
The MIDI velocity of the note being heard is what?
Options:
A. midi_velocity_127
B. midi_velocity_75
C. midi_velocity_50
D. midi_velocity_25
Answer with only the option letter and text, e.g. 'A. ...'.
